title: Enable S3 Public Access Block
console_steps: 4. Under 'Block public access (bucket settings)', click Edit
- Block public access granted through new ACLs
- Block public access granted through any ACLs
- Block public and cross-account access granted through new public bucket policies
terraform_snippet:
resource "aws_s3_bucket_public_access_block" "example" {
  bucket = aws_s3_bucket.example.id

  block_public_acls       = true
  block_public_policy     = true
  ignore_public_acls      = true
  restrict_public_buckets = true
}

references.title: Ensure S3 bucket has a public access block
Restrict inbound traffic from untrusted networks

risk_reduction: Critical — eliminates public S3 data exposure
rollback_difficulty: Easy — can reverse public access block settings
